name: deadline-demon
description: Arm session deadlines and nudge AI agents to finish on time, with optional hard enforcement.

interface.longDescription: Arm a per-session deadline with deadline or deadline-hard in Codex, get remaining-time context each turn, and optionally block non-wrap-up tool calls after time runs out. Slash-shaped commands remain available in clients that pass them through.
defaultPrompt: Arm a deadline for this task.
Use deadline 8 "finish this change" in Codex.
Use deadline-hard 10 "ship the fix" in Codex.
